mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_NO, CLIENT_NO, ADDRESS_TYPE, ADDRESS_DETAIL, LAST_CHANGE_DATE, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS, IS_NEWEST, DEL_FLAG FROM CIF_ADDRESS WHERE CLIENT_NO = #{clientNo} AND DEL_FLAG = #{delFlag}
mapper.update: UPDATE CIF_ADDRESS SET ADDRESS_TYPE = #{addressType}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addressDetail}, LAST_CHANGE_DATE = #{lastChangeDate}, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS = #{isMailingAddress}, IS_NEWEST = #{isNewest}, DEL_FLAG = #{delFlag} WHERE SEQ_NO = #{seqNo}

update.foreach: UPDATE CIF_ADDRESS SET ADDRESS_TYPE = #{addr.addressType}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addr.addressDetail}, LAST_CHANGE_DATE = #{addr.lastChangeDate}, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS = #{addr.isMailingAddress}, IS_NEWEST = #{addr.isNewest}, DEL_FLAG = #{addr.delFlag} WHERE SEQ_NO = #{addr.seqNo};
